title: Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo
text:
Static, reproducible analysis site for transport + LCI comparisons across dry vs refrigerated product flows and diesel vs BEV scenarios.
Last canonical snapshot: 2026-03-08
Validation gates: PASS

title: Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo
text:
Explore


Methodology and Initial Results
Start here for model pipeline, validation status, and initial figures.
Open Methodology & Results


Scenario Explorer
Interactive, artifact-driven scenario table and filters.
Open Scenario Explorer


Flow Map
Static map from derived FAF flow artifacts.
Open Flow Map


Transport Results
Compiled transport outputs and supporting visuals.
Open Transport Results

title: Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo
text:
Reproducibility

Runtime Model

No live services are queried during page rendering.
Pages consume committed/generated artifacts from data/derived/, artifacts/github_release/, and generated site assets.
Works for local render and GitHub Pages publishing.

Offline-first Artifact-driven Deterministic snapshot

title: Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo
text:
Quick Start
git clone https://github.com/dMac716/coldchain-freight-montecarlo.git
cd coldchain-freight-montecarlo
bash tools/smoke_test.sh
quarto render site/

title: Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo
text:
Codespaces Path
# postCreate installs core deps
Rscript -e 'testthat::test_dir("tests/testthat")'
bash tools/build_presentation_artifacts.sh --skip-runs --with-animation
bash tools/validate_final_artifacts.sh
quarto render site/

title: Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo
text:
Pipeline Overview





flowchart LR
  A[data/inputs_local/*.csv] --> B[R/01_validate.R]
  B --> C[R/03_model_core.R deterministic equations]
  C --> D[R/04_sampling.R Monte Carlo draws]
  D --> E[R/06_analysis.R summary stats]
  E --> F[outputs/* run + analysis artifacts]
  F --> G[tools/build_presentation_artifacts.sh]
  G --> H[outputs/presentation/canonical/final_release_bundle]
  H --> I[artifacts/github_release/canonical_2026-03-08]
  I --> J[site/* + docs/* GitHub Pages]

title: Team Runs
text: Run `Rscript tools/refresh_site_from_bq.R --project <GCP_PROJECT> --dataset coldchain_sim --n 50` to refresh site/data CSVs.

title: Methodology and Initial Results
text: This page documents the validated canonical artifact build committed on 2026-03-08 and provides the first publishable results set.

title: Methodology and Initial Results
text: This page documents the validated canonical artifact build committed on 2026-03-08 and provides the first publishable results set.

title: Methodology and Initial Results
text:
Methodology

Define canonical runs in config/canonical_run_matrix.csv.
Generate paired transport Monte Carlo bundles for dry/refrigerated families.
Build merged LCI outputs and completeness audits.
Build presentation artifacts and route animations.
Validate with tools/validate_final_artifacts.sh and emit release manifest/report.


Validation Source

artifacts/github_release/canonical_2026-03-08/manifest/release_readiness_report.md

title: Methodology and Initial Results
text:
Artifact Links

GitHub-ready snapshot: artifacts/github_release/canonical_2026-03-08/
Manifest/index/readiness: .../manifest/
Animations and previews: .../animations/
Merged LCI and completeness tables: .../lci/


Roadmap: Animation Upgrade
Current route animations are mostly latitude/longitude playback with counters.
Next iteration should add richer map context, event overlays (charging/refuel/delay windows), and stronger scenario callouts for presentation storytelling.

title: Transport Presentation Graphics Notes
text:
bundle_root: /Users/dMac/Repos/coldchain-freight-montecarlo/outputs/run_bundle/full_n20_fix
pair summaries scanned: 200
validation_root: /Users/dMac/Repos/coldchain-freight-montecarlo/outputs/validation/full_n20_fix





scenario = CENTRALIZED
powertrain = diesel
traffic_mode = stochastic
status in {OK, blank, missing/NA}
origin_network in {dry_factory_set, refrigerated_factory_set}
matched pair_id enforced (both origins required per pair)
functional_unit_basis = per_1000kcal





candidate valid rows before case selection: 400
rows in selected case before pair matching: 40
rows after matched-pair enforcement: 40
matched pairs used: 20





Graphic 1 metric: co2_per_1000kcal (kg CO2 / 1000 kcal delivered)
Graphic 2 basis: diesel gal / 1000 kcal
Graphic 2 uses propulsion and TRU components normalized per 1000 kcal from run-level values





Paired-comparison logic preserved using pair_id matching.
No cross-scenario/powertrain mixing inside the selected case.
For Graphic 2, direct CO2 propulsion/TRU split was not used when not cleanly populated; direct fuel/energy components were used per FU basis.





GIF created: yes
MP4 created: yes
Last frame PNG exported for static-slide fallback.





Added transport_trip_time_diagnostic.png/.svg (3-panel story figure).
Added refrigerated_split_diagnostic.png/.svg (compact cause check).
Added transport_mc_evolution.mp4/.gif and final frame PNG emphasizing convergence and refrigerated regime emergence.
